zh.lifeSummary: 當Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach於1401年3月27日出生在德國貝也沃爾福拉善森時，他的父親Ernest of Bavaria-Munich28歲，母親Elisabetta Visconti27歲。他於1427年與Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck在德國貝也明陳結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年2月29日在德國貝也明陳享年58歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach于1401年3月27日出生在德国貝也沃爾福拉善森时，他的父亲Ernest of Bavaria-Munich28岁，母亲Elisabetta Visconti27岁。他于1427年与Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck在德国貝也明陳结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年2月29日在德国貝也明陳享年58岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 斯塔恩格安德斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Bayern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach was born on 27 March 1401, in Wolfratshausen, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Ernest of Bavaria-Munich, was 28 and his mother, Elisabetta Visconti, was 27. He married Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck in 1427, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 29 February 1460, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 58, and was buried in Andechs, Starnberg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach est né le 27 mars 1401, à Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ernest of Bavaria-Munich, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisabetta Visconti, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck en 1427, à München, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 29 février 1460, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach am 27. März 1401 in Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ernest of Bavaria-Munich 28 und seine Mutter Elisabetta Visconti 27. Er hat 1427 in München, Bayern, Deutschland Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Februar 1460 im Alter von 58 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach è nato il il 27 marzo 1401 nel Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Ernest of Bavaria-Munich, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elisabetta Visconti, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck nel 1427, nel München, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 febbraio 1460, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbachが1401年3月27日にドイツバイエルンウオルフラトシャウセンで生まれた時，父Ernest of Bavaria-Munichは28歳，母Elisabetta Viscontiは27歳であった。1427年にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンでAnna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年2月29日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで58歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス スターンバーグアンデチスにて埋葬された。

ko.München, Hutthurm, Passau, Bavaria, Germ: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 파소 후스 u천

ko.lifeSummary: Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach(이)가 1401년 3월 27일 독일 베이른 울프라츠하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ernest of Bavaria-Munich(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabetta Visconti(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1427년 독일 베이른 u천에서 Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 2월 29일 독일 베이른 u천에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 스타른버그 앤데크스에 묻혔다.

pt.27 MAR 1401–29 FEB 1460: 27 de março de 1401–29 de fevereiro de 1460
pt.München, Hutthurm, Passau, Bavaria, Germ: München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.Staubing, Bayern, Deutschland(HRR): Staubing, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemanha

pt.München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bay: München, Hutthurm, Landkreis Passau, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach nasceu em 27 de março de 1401, em Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ernest of Bavaria-Munich, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisabetta Visconti, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck em 1427, em München, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de fevereiro de 1460, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.München, Hutthurm, Passau, Bavaria, Germ: мuнчэн, хуттурм, ландкрис пассау, беиирн, Германия

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach родился 27 марта 1401 г. в местности волфрацхаусен, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Ernest of Bavaria-Munich было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabetta Visconti, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck в 1427 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 29 февраля 1460 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности андечс, ландкрис старнбирг, беиирн, Германия.

es.27 MAR 1401–29 FEB 1460: 27 de marzo de 1401–29 de febrero de 1460

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herzog Albrecht III von Bayern Wittelsbach nació el 27 de marzo de 1401, en Wolfratshausen, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Ernest of Bavaria-Munich, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisabetta Visconti, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Anna Princess von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen-Einbeck en 1427, en München, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de febrero de 1460, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Andechs, Landkreis Starnberg, Bayern, Alemania.
